beats.narration: The last move of this module points the coil at the metal itself. Not is there a crack — is this the right temper and thickness?

payload.title: SORTING TEMPER, READING THICKNESS
payload.sub: Same impedance plane, a brand-new question.

beats.narration: Conductivity, in percent IACS, tracks heat treatment. Aging pulls solute into precipitates and marches the number upward — so every temper owns a window.
So read the geometry like a Level Two. A 7075 part reading thirty-seven sits above T6, below T73 — in no window at all.
Then thickness flips the enemy into a ruler. Fix the substrate and lift-off becomes the measurement — read coating thickness off the curve.
One discipline runs all four jobs: match the reference standard to the part, put the current where the answer lives, then re-standardize.

payload.sub: Alloy, temper, curvature, thickness — the reference must match the job.
